Project Glasswing: 为 AI 时代保护关键软件

Project Glasswing: Securing critical software for the AI era

2026-04-08

Anthropic 宣布推出 Project Glasswing，一项旨在保护全球最关键软件的新计划，为防御者在即将到来的 AI 驱动网络安全时代提供持久优势。

随着 AI 能力的快速发展，网络安全格局正在发生根本性变化。Project Glasswing 致力于：

  • 识别和保护关键基础设施软件
  • 为防御者提供 AI 时代的安全工具和方法
  • 建立可持续的安全优势，应对新兴威胁
  • 推动关键软件供应链的安全改进

这是 Anthropic 在 AI 安全领域的重要布局，体现了对 AI 时代网络安全挑战的深刻认识。

阅读完整文章：https://www.anthropic.com/glasswing

Anthropic announced Project Glasswing, a new initiative to secure the world's most critical software and give defenders a durable advantage in the coming AI-driven era of cybersecurity.

As AI capabilities advance rapidly, the cybersecurity landscape is undergoing fundamental changes. Project Glasswing is committed to:

  • Identifying and protecting critical infrastructure software
  • Providing defenders with security tools and methods for the AI era
  • Building sustainable security advantages against emerging threats
  • Driving security improvements in critical software supply chains

This represents Anthropic's significant investment in AI safety, demonstrating deep understanding of cybersecurity challenges in the AI era.

Read the full article at https://www.anthropic.com/glasswing
